title.en: China-to-Kenya Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Kenya KEBS PVoC import conformity, IEC 62109 safety evidence, EPRA and Kenya Power grid-connection expectations, net-metering readiness, 50 Hz settings, and China GB/T baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与肯尼亚 KEBS PVoC 进口合格评定、IEC 62109 安全证据、EPRA 与 Kenya Power 并网要求、净计量准备、50 Hz 参数及中国 GB/T 基线差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與肯亞 KEBS PVoC 進口合格評定、IEC 62109 安全證據、EPRA 與 Kenya Power 併網要求、淨計量準備、50 Hz 參數及中國 GB/T 基線差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KEBS PVoC scope determination, EPRA licence or net-metering approval, Kenya Power grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Kenya standards, PVoC contractor instructions, EPRA rules, Kenya Power interconnection requirements, customs requirements, and project documents with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KEBS PVoC 适用范围裁定、EPRA 许可或净计量批准、Kenya Power 并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行肯尼亚标准、PVoC 承包商指引、EPRA 规则、Kenya Power 接入要求、海关要求及项目文件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KEBS PVoC 適用範圍裁定、EPRA 許可或淨計量批准、Kenya Power 併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行肯亞標準、PVoC 承包商指引、EPRA 規則、Kenya Power 接入要求、海關要求及專案文件。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Kenya, the practical gaps are KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity for imports, model-level safety evidence typically mapped to IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 or accepted Kenya standards, EPRA and Kenya Power approval for grid-connected projects and net-metering arrangements, and Kenya 50 Hz grid settings. China GB/T or NB/T evidence is useful technical support but should not be treated as a substitute for Kenya import clearance or grid approval.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口肯尼亚时，实际差距包括：进口环节的 KEBS PVoC 合格证书、通常按 IEC 62109-1 与 IEC 62109-2 或肯尼亚认可标准映射的型号级安全证据、并网项目和净计量安排所需的 EPRA 与 Kenya Power 批准，以及肯尼亚 50 Hz 电网参数。中国 GB/T 或 NB/T 证据可作为技术支持，但不应被视为替代肯尼亚进口清关或并网批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口肯亞時，實際差距包括：進口環節的 KEBS PVoC 合格證書、通常按 IEC 62109-1 與 IEC 62109-2 或肯亞認可標準映射的型號級安全證據、併網專案和淨計量安排所需的 EPRA 與 Kenya Power 批准，以及肯亞 50 Hz 電網參數。中國 GB/T 或 NB/T 證據可作為技術支持，但不應被視為替代肯亞進口清關或併網批准。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
